{{CargoRelic
|name=Fleming's Diode
|class_id=22204
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=05-23
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On May 23, 1884 AD, Fleming met with Edison during his visit to America, and he designed this electron diode because of their meeting.<br>This diode is the masterpiece of British engineer, Fleming. It has the characteristic of unidirectional conduction as semi-conductors and the functions of detection and rectification. As one of the core components of future electron equipment, it is the initial model of the electron tube, which was a huge milestone, opening up the development of the entire electron industry.
|fame=44
|art=34
|fth=54
|civ=37
|tech=74
|ss1=Mecha Minion HP +3%<br>Mecha Minion HARD Stats +0.9%
|ss2=Mecha Minion HP +4%<br>Mecha Minion HARD Stats +1.2%
|ss3=Mecha Minion HP +5%<br>Mecha Minion HARD Stats +1.5%
|ss4=Mecha Minion HP +7%<br>Mecha Minion HARD Stats +2.1%
|ss5=Mecha Minion HP +9%<br>Mecha Minion HARD Stats +2.7%
|ss7=Mecha Minion HP +9%<br>Mecha Minion HARD Stats +2.7%<br>Mecha Minion HARD Stats +2.1% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Timemachine skill II.png|50px]]Place in Time Machine: Travel Speedup Output +15%
|skill2=[[File:Timemachine skill II.png|50px]]Place in Time Machine: Time Machine Max Cap +15%
}}
